title: scorzoneroides × hugueninii
intro: Scorzoneroides × hugueninii is a hybrid plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a cross between Scorzoneroides physospermum and Scorzonera hispanica. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides × hugueninii include its potential to support liver function, improve digestive health, and alleviate symptoms associated with irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the roots or leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
